subject: URGENT: Systematic Validation Failures - 0% Success Rate

content.issue: Systematic validation failures across all work
content.impact: 0% validation success rate indicates process breakdown
patterns_identified: Workers not following complete validation protocol
business_impact: No work can be marked as complete
recommendations: Review and enforce validation protocol with all workers
Provide clear evidence templates and requirements
Require validation evidence before task submission
immediate_actions_needed: Coach workers on proper validation evidence creation
Review and update validation requirements documentation
Establish quality gates to prevent incomplete submissions
content.risk_assessment: HIGH - Continued 0% success rate will create significant delivery delays and quality issues
